scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:panel && bun run build:agent
scripts.build:agent:amd64: cd agent && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o ../dist/bsdock-agent-linux-amd64 ./cmd/agent
scripts.build:agent:arm64: cd agent && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o ../dist/bsdock-agent-linux-arm64 ./cmd/agent
scripts.test: bun run test:panel && bun run test:agent && bun run test:web
